name: Mechanics
raw_prereq: MATH 10A or 20A. Recommended preparation: concurrent or prior enrollment in MATH 10B or 20B.

name: Mechanics Laboratory
raw_prereq: MATH 10A or 20A. Recommended preparation: concurrent or prior enrollment in PHYS 1A and MATH 10B or 20B.

name: Electricity and Magnetism Laboratory
raw_prereq: PHYS 1A or 2A, 1AL or 2BL, and MATH 10B or 20B. Recommended preparation: concurrent or prior enrollment in PHYS 1B.

name: Waves, Optics, and Modern Physics Laboratory
raw_prereq: PHYS 1B or 2B, 1BL or 2CL, and MATH 10B or 20B. Recommended preparation: concurrent or prior enrollment in PHYS 1C.

name: Physics—Mechanics
raw_prereq: MATH 10A-B or 20A or 20B or 20C or 31BH. Recommended preparation: prior or concurrent enrollment in MATH 20B.

name: Physics—Electricity and Magnetism
raw_prereq: PHYS 2A or 4A and MATH 20B or 20C or 31BH. Recommended preparation: prior or concurrent enrollment in MATH 20C or 31BH.

name: Physics Laboratory—Mechanics
raw_prereq: PHYS 2A or 4A. Recommended preparation: prior or concurrent enrollment in PHYS 2B or 4C.

name: Physics—Fluids, Waves, Thermodynamics, and Optics
raw_prereq: PHYS 2A or 4A, and MATH 20C or 31BH. Recommended preparation: prior or concurrent enrollment in MATH 20D. Prior completion of PHYS 2B is strongly recommended.

name: Physics Laboratory—Electricity and Magnetism
raw_prereq: PHYS 2A or 4A, and 2B or 4C. Recommended preparation: prior or concurrent enrollment in PHYS 2C or 4D.

name: Physics—Relativity and Quantum Physics
raw_prereq: PHYS 2A or 4A, 2B, and MATH 20D. Recommended preparation: prior or concurrent enrollment in MATH 20E.

name: Physics Laboratory—Modern Physics
raw_prereq: PHYS 2BL or 2CL. Recommended preparation: prior or concurrent enrollment in PHYS 2D or 4E.

name: Physics for Physics Majors–Mechanics
raw_prereq: MATH 20A. Recommended preparation: prior or concurrent enrollment in MATH 20B and a knowledge of vectors.

name: Physics for Physics Majors—Fluids, Waves, Statistical and Thermal Physics
raw_prereq: PHYS 4A and MATH 20A-B. Recommended preparation: prior or concurrent enrollment in MATH 20C or 31BH.

name: Physics for Physics Majors—Electricity and Magnetism
raw_prereq: PHYS 4A-B or PHYS 2A-B-C, MATH 20A-B-C or 31BH, and 18 or 20F or 31AH. Recommended preparation: prior or concurrent enrollment in MATH 20E or 31CH.

name: Physics for Physics Majors—Electromagnetic Waves, Special Relativity and Optics
raw_prereq: PHYS 4A-B-C or the combination of PHYS 4C and PHYS 2A-B-C, MATH 20A-B-C or 31BH, 20E or 31CH, and 18 or 20F or 31AH. Recommended preparation: prior or concurrent enrollment in MATH 20D.

name: Physics for Physics Majors—Quantum Physics
raw_prereq: PHYS 4A-B-C-D or the combination of PHYS 4A and 4C and 4D and PHYS 2A-B-C, MATH 20A-B-C or 31BH, 20D, 20E or 31CH, and 18 or 20F or 31AH.

name: Poetry for Physicists
raw_prereq: CAT 2 or DOC 2 or HUM 1 or MCWP 40 or MMW 12 or WARR 11A or WCWP 10A and CAT 3 or DOC 3 or HUM 2 or MCWP 50 or MMW 13 or WARR 11B or WCWP 10B.

name: Independent Study
raw_prereq: lower-division standing. Completion of thirty units at UC San Diego undergraduate study, a minimum UC San Diego GPA of 3.0, and a completed and approved Special Studies form. Department stamp required.

name: Electromagnetism I
raw_prereq: PHYS 4A-B-C-D; MATH 20A, 20B, 20C or 31BH, 20D, 20E or 31CH, and 18 or 20F or 31AH. Open to major codes PY26, PY28, PY29, PY32, PY33, PY34, and PY35 only.

name: Electromagnetism II
raw_prereq: PHYS 100A, MATH 20A, 20B, 20C or 31BH, 20D, 20E or 31CH, and 18 or 20F or 31AH. Open to major codes PY26, PY28, PY29, PY32, PY33, PY34, and PY35 only.

name: Electromagnetism III
raw_prereq: PHYS 100B. Open to major codes PY26, PY28, PY29, PY32, PY33, PY34, and PY35 only.

name: Mathematical and Computational Physics I
raw_prereq: PHYS 4B-C-D-E, MATH 20A-B-C or 31BH, 20D, 20E or 31CH, and 18 or 20F or 31AH. Open to major codes PY26, PY28, PY29, PY32, PY33, PY34, and PY35 only.

name: Mathematical and Computational Physics II
raw_prereq: PHYS 105A, MATH 20A-B-C or 31BH, 20D, 20E or 31CH, and 18 or 20F or 31AH. Open to major codes PY26, PY28, PY29, PY32, PY33, PY34, and PY35 only.

name: Mechanics I
raw_prereq: PHYS 4A-B-C-D, MATH 20A-B-C or 31BH, 20D, 20E or 31CH, and 18 or 20F or 31AH. Open to major codes PY26, PY28, PY29, PY32, PY33, PY34, and PY35 only.

name: Mechanics II
raw_prereq: PHYS 110A, MATH 20A-B-C or 31BH, 20D, 20E or 31CH, and 18 or 20F or 31AH. Open to major codes PY26, PY28, PY29, PY32, PY33, PY34, and PY35 only.

name: Circuits and Electronics
raw_prereq: PHYS 4A-B-C, and 2CL. Open to major codes PY26, PY28, PY29, PY32, PY33, PY34, and PY35 only. Recommended preparation: PHYS 100A.

name: Quantum Physics I
raw_prereq: PHYS 4A-B-C-D-E, 100A, 110A. Open to major codes PY26, PY28, PY29, PY32, PY33, PY34, and PY35 only.

name: Quantum Physics II
raw_prereq: PHYS 100B and 130A. Open to major codes PY26, PY28, PY29, PY32, PY33, PY34, and PY35 only.

name: Condensed Matter/Materials Science Laboratory
raw_prereq: PHYS 2CL and 2DL. Open to major codes PY26, PY28, PY29, PY32, PY33, PY34, and PY35 only.

name: Physics Special Topics
raw_prereq: PHYS 2A-B-C-D or 4A-B-C-D-E, MATH 20A-B-C or 31BH, and 18 or 20F or 31AH.

name: Statistical and Thermal Physics I
raw_prereq: PHYS 130A. Open to major codes PY26, PY28, PY29, PY32, PY33, PY34, and PY35 only.

name: Statistical and Thermal Physics II
raw_prereq: PHYS 130B and 140A. Open to major codes PY26, PY28, PY29, PY32, PY33, PY34, and PY35 only.

Computational Physics II: PDE and Matrix Models

name: Modern Physics Laboratory: Biological and Quantum Physics
Biological Physics

name: Quantitative Microbiology
raw_prereq: PHYS 140A. Recommended preparation: an introductory course in statistical mechanics or equivalent; ordinary differential equations.

name: Physics of the Cell
raw_prereq: upper-division standing. Recommended preparation: familiarity with statistical mechanics at the level of PHYS 140A or CHEM 132.

name: Biophysics of Neurons and Networks
raw_prereq: upper-division standing. Recommended preparation: a working knowledge of calculus and linear algebra.

name: Directed Group Study
raw_prereq: consent of instructor and departmental chair.

name: Research for Undergraduates
raw_prereq: consent of instructor and departmental chair.

name: Honors Thesis Research for Undergraduates
raw_prereq: admission to the Honors Program in Physics.

name: Field Theory and the Renormalization Group

Introduction to the Standard Model and Beyond

Experimental Techniques for Quantitative Biology

MS Thesis Research in Materials Physics
